sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_datetime (id INT PRIMARY KEY, created_at DATETIME);
INSERT INTO test_datetime (id, created_at) VALUES (1, curdatetimeoffset());
UPDATE test_datetime SET created_at = curdatetimeoffset(500) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, created_at FROM test_datetime WHERE created_at > curdatetimeoffset(1000);
DELETE FROM test_datetime WHERE created_at < curdatetimeoffset();
